behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the interface NodeCommandInterceptor, package org.openqa.selenium.grid.node, methods isEnabled/initialize/intercept, Closeable, LocalNode Builder.addInterceptor, ServiceLoader usage, BUILD file updates — all test-asserted specifics are derivable.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what to build (SPI, methods, integration points) without dictating exact implementation lines or code.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert gold-specific internals: private method name 'executeWithInterceptors' (test_execute_with_interceptors_method_exists) and exact reverse-iteration loop syntax 'for (int i = interceptors.size() - 1; i >= 0; i--)' (test_interceptor_chaining_builds_from_last_to_first); valid alternative implementations using streams, recursion, or different naming would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: While many tests are regex-on-source, TestBazelCompilation runs bazel build/test subprocesses that execute real compilation.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require concrete method signatures, ServiceLoader calls, and successful Bazel compilation — a stub cannot satisfy these.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Interface existence, methods, Closeable, LocalNode integration, factory ServiceLoader, BUILD deps, and shutdown cleanup are all tested.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped into named classes by concern (TestNodeCommandInterceptorInterface, TestLocalNodeInterceptorSupport, etc.).

structured_data_schema.reason: No structured data output; task is a Java SPI.

no_typos.reason: Paths, class names, and package names are consistent between instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction references relevant packages and factory, consistent with task scope; no specific line numbers.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: BUILD.bazel edits in gold patch add single lines, not full-file rewrites.
